ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material in g/cm³ */,
  "hardness" TEXT /* Hardness of the material (e.g., Brinell, Rockwell) */,
  "melting_point" INTEGER /* Melting point of the material in degrees Celsius */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material in W/(m·K) */,
  "electrical_conductivity" REAL /* Electrical conductivity of the material in S/m */,
  "tensile_strength" INTEGER /* Tensile strength of the material in MPa */,
  "elongation" REAL /* Elongation at break of the material in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool recommendation */,
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guideline the recommendation is associated with */,
  "tool_type" TEXT /* Type of tool recommended */,
  "tool_material" TEXT /* Material of the recommended tool */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the tool recommendation */,
  "tool_coating" TEXT /* Coating of the tool */,
  "tool_flutes" INTEGER /* Number of flutes on the tool */,
  "tool_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the tool in millimeters */,
  "tool_length" REAL /* Length of the tool in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cutting_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cutting condition */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool recommendation the condition is associated with */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Recommended cutting speed */,
  "feed_rate" TEXT /* Recommended feed rate */,
  "depth_of_cut" TEXT /* Recommended depth of cut */,
  "spindle_speed" TEXT /* Recommended spindle speed (RPM) */,
  "cutting_depth" TEXT /* Recommended cutting depth in millimeters */,
  "cutting_force" TEXT /* Estimated cutting force in Newtons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cutting_conditions_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES tool_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubrication_methods" (
  "lubrication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lubrication method */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool recommendation the method is associated with */,
  "lubricant_type" TEXT /* Type of lubricant used */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of applying the lubricant */,
  "lubricant_viscosity" TEXT /* Viscosity of the lubricant */,
  "lubricant_pressure" TEXT /* Pressure of the lubricant system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lubrication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubrication_methods_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES tool_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machining_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machining result */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cutting condition the result is associated with */,
  "tool_wear" TEXT /* Level of tool wear observed */,
  "surface_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the machined surface */,
  "process_efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the machining process */,
  "tool_life" TEXT /* Estimated tool life in hours */,
  "material_removed_rate" TEXT /* Rate of material removed in cubic millimeters per minute */,
  "vibration_level" TEXT /* Vibration level during machining */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machining_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES cutting_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, machinist, supervisor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User-specific preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guideline being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the guideline */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the guideline was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machining result the analytics is associated with */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine used for the operation */,
  "operation_time" TEXT /* Duration of the machining operation */,
  "tool更换次数" INTEGER /* Number of tool changes during the operation */,
  "material_removed" TEXT /* Amount of material removed during the operation */,
  "power_consumption" TEXT /* Power consumption during the operation in kW */,
  "idle_time" TEXT /* Idle time during the operation in minutes */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Whether maintenance is needed after the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES machining_results ("result_id")
)
